summary: Completed comprehensive testing of banner carousel implementation. All backend APIs working correctly. New horizontal scrollable image card carousel successfully replaces old hero slider with all required features working perfectly.
passed_tests: 5 banner cards found with correct data-testid format
Team crest images present in each card (2 per card)
306 match cards below banner preserved and functional
Tab navigation working (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended)
League filter pills functional (All Matches, Live, UCL, etc.)
Mobile view (430px) shows 1 full + 1 partial card correctly
Prediction buttons and view toggles still functional
